context: Tests Go-specific pipeline conventions: GoTool@0 (not @1 or @latest), caching at $(GOPATH)/pkg/mod using go.sum as key, go vet before tests, -race and -coverprofile flags on test command, and CGO_ENABLED=0 for container builds.

checklist.name: Go modules cache path
checklist.description: The Cache@2 task uses `$(GOPATH)/pkg/mod` as the cache path (not a generic or incorrect path)

checklist.name: go.sum as cache key
checklist.description: The Cache@2 task uses `go.sum` in its key (e.g., `go | "$(Agent.OS)" | go.sum`)

checklist.name: go vet before tests
checklist.description: A `go vet ./...` step appears before the test step

checklist.name: -race flag on tests
checklist.description: The test command includes the `-race` flag

checklist.name: -coverprofile flag on tests
checklist.description: The test command includes a `-coverprofile` flag

checklist.name: CGO_ENABLED=0 on build
checklist.description: The binary build step sets `CGO_ENABLED=0` as an environment variable or inline in the command

checklist.name: displayName on all steps
checklist.description: Every task and script step has a displayName property

checklist.name: Pinned vmImage
checklist.description: Pool vmImage uses a specific version (e.g., ubuntu-22.04) not ubuntu-latest

checklist.name: No @latest task usage
checklist.description: No task in the file uses @latest version
